page.notEnabled: AI Quote Drafts is not enabled.
page.title: AI Quote Drafts
page.subtitle: Pick an enquiry, choose a package, type the final price you commit to, and generate a draft proposal — by template or by AI. Edit freely, save, and copy to send via your usual channel.
page.aiLocked: AI generation locked — enable in Settings
page.footer: AI Quote Drafts — deterministic template or AI-assisted, both human-edited. No messages are sent and no booking is confirmed from this page.

disclaimer.title: Indicative proposal — manual verification required.
disclaimer.body: Indicative proposal only. Final room availability, price, taxes and booking confirmation must be manually confirmed by the property team.
disclaimer.governance: AI draft future mein help karega, lekin abhi price aur room availability staff ko manually verify karni hogi.

aiNotice.title: Phase 8A — no live AI in use.
aiNotice.body: Draft text is generated from a deterministic template. Real AI generation will be enabled only after AI usage logging, owner approval workflow, prompt safety controls, and audit logs are in place.

leadPicker.title: Pick an enquiry
leadPicker.desc: Choose from your open leads (status: New / Qualified / Quoted / Won). PII is read only — nothing is written or persisted by this workspace.
leadPicker.noOpenLeads: No open leads found for this hotel. Add a lead from the Leads workspace first.

packagePicker.title: Choose a package
packagePicker.noPublished: No published packages yet. Showing sample templates — head to Experience Packages in the dashboard to build your own.
packagePicker.inclusionsTitle: Inclusions (tick what to include in this draft)
packagePicker.noInclusions: No inclusions configured for this package.
packagePicker.leaveUnticked: Leave all unticked to include the package's default list in the draft.

verified.title: Verified details (manual)
verified.finalPrice: Final price (typed manually — what you commit to the guest)
verified.pricePlaceholder: e.g. ₹8,500 per room per night (inclusive of breakfast)
verified.suggestedRate: Suggested base rate from your rate engine: {{rate}} per night. For reference only — type your final price above.
verified.notesPlaceholder: e.g. Early check-in subject to room readiness, complimentary fruit basket on arrival.
verified.cbAvailability: I verified room type, price and availability manually.
verified.cbTerms: I understand this is a draft proposal, not a confirmed booking.

generator.intro: Generate the draft — by deterministic template or by AI. Either way, edit before sending.
generator.aiTitleLocked: Owner must enable AI quote drafts in Settings.
generator.markedSent: Marked sent via {{channel}} just now. This records the operator's manual send — VAiyu does not send any message itself.

aiError.CONSENT_REQUIRED: AI generation is locked for this hotel.
aiError.BUDGET_EXCEEDED: Daily AI budget reached for this hotel.
aiError.AI_NOT_CONFIGURED: AI provider is not configured on the server.
aiError.AI_REFUSED: AI declined to draft — too little information.
aiError.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Try again in a minute.
aiError.NOT_AUTHORIZED: You are not authorised for this hotel.

markSent.tooltipDefault: Record that you sent this draft via your usual channel.
markSent.disclaimer: VAiyu does not send the message. This just records what you did.

preview.title: Draft proposal
preview.placeholder: Select a lead and package, then click Generate draft. You can edit freely before copying.
preview.hintEmpty: No draft yet — fill the form on the left and click Generate.
preview.hintReady: Both governance checkboxes are ticked. You can copy when ready.
preview.hintTick: Tick both operator approval checkboxes above to enable Copy.
preview.copyTitleDisabled: Tick both approval checkboxes and generate a draft first.

previousDrafts.title: Previous drafts
previousDrafts.forThisHotel: Recent drafts for this hotel — pick a lead to narrow.

sendButton.tooltipNoEmail: No email on file for this lead — open the lead and add one.
sendButton.tooltipAlreadySentTo: Already sent to {{addr}}. Click to resend.
sendButton.tooltipSends: Sends the quote PDF to {{recipient}} via Resend.

sendModal.invalidEmail: Doesn't look like a valid email.
sendModal.resendPlaceholder: Guest asked us to send again / updated price / etc.
sendModal.resendHint: Logged to audit. Helps you remember why you re-sent.
sendModal.pdfNote: A branded PDF is attached automatically. Generated from the current draft text — save edits before sending if needed.

error.IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_REQUIRED: Internal: missing dedup token. Reopen the dialog and try again.
error.GOVERNANCE_INCOMPLETE: Please tick both approval checkboxes before sending.
error.ALREADY_SENT: This quote was already sent. Use Resend instead.
error.RESEND_REQUIRES_SENT: Resend is only available after the first send. Use Send first.
error.RESEND_REASON_REQUIRED: A short reason is required for a resend.
error.WHATSAPP_PENDING_APPROVAL: WhatsApp is pending Meta template approval. Email only for now.
error.UNSUPPORTED_CHANNEL: That delivery channel isn't supported yet.
error.PDF_GENERATION_FAILED: Could not generate the PDF. Check the draft text and try again.
error.STORAGE_UPLOAD_FAILED: Could not save the PDF. Please retry in a moment.
error.SIGN_URL_FAILED: Could not produce a download link. Please retry.
error.NOT_AUTHORIZED: You don't have permission to send quotes for this hotel.
error.default: Send failed. Please try again. If it persists, contact support.
